Small ionization fission chamber to measure
absolute number of U-233 fission events.
. Absolute yield of fission fragments were determined
using absolute number of U-233 fission events measured
. Normalization of mass distribution curve to 200% was
used as an additional check. Symmetrical points in mass
curve were obtained by NU=2.7 prt/fis, NU dependence
from mass was not taken into account.
Data line for Ce-141 transferred as
. Ba-140 and Ce-141 yields were measured absolutely by
measurement of neutron flux with aid of an
alpha-particle counter. Other isotope yields were
determined relative to Ba-140 and Ce-141 yields.
. Normalization of mass distribution curve to 200% was
used as an additional check. Symmetrical points in mass
curve were obtained by NU=4.5 prt/fis, NU dependence
from mass was not taken into account.
